global_description: A small, plump bird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a predominantly gray body with a white belly and dark eyes. The wings and back are a darker shade of gray, and the bird has a small, conical pinkish bill.

part_details.body: Rounded, plump shape, predominantly gray with a white belly.
part_details.eyes: Dark and prominent, set against the gray plumage.
part_details.wings: Darker gray, blending with the back.
part_details.tail: Short, matching the darker gray of the wings.

spatial_relations: The dark eyes are set within the gray plumage of the head.
The small pinkish bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The darker gray wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
